title.en: But at least give it a try.

content.en:
Hard to kill?

Ye Tian wasn't worried about this, his current strength was not comparable to the past, he was able to kill the strongest legendary-level creatures when he reached the Dao Realm, and now even if the top-level legendary-level creatures became stronger, he was sure to kill them.

However, it is definitely not only him who is eyeing the strongest legendary-level creatures, many legendary Dao realms and legendary Dao void demons must also be targeted, and there must be a strong person who surpasses Ye Tian.

Therefore, if he wants to snatch the blood of the Legend of the Xeon, it will be difficult.

But at least give it a try.

......

this day.

Legend has it that the ancient ruins have officially opened.

All the legends and Dao realms have gone to the legendary ruins.

Legends of ancient ruins.

"Come in!"

After Ye Tian came in, he immediately condensed his true body to copy his body, and then went to find a legendary-level creature.

At this time, many demon lords who were at the level of the Legendary Void Demon also came to the Legendary Ancient Ruins.

It can be said that the Legend to the Dao Realm or the Legend to the Dao Void Demon who dares to enter here are not weak, even if they are weak, there are enough life-saving things.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to encounter another Legendary Dao Void Demon.

Legend has reached the late realm of Dao Void Demon!

This is the other party's cultivation.

When the other party saw Ye Tian, he ran away without saying a word.

Obviously, he recognized Ye Tian.

However.

Airplanes!!!!!

The second sequence of the rules of the Dao turned into a prison to block this area, and then instantly tied up the demon lord.

The life-preserving thing on the other party's body was constantly stimulated, trying to resist the strangulation of the second sequence of supreme rules.

"Die!"

Ye Tian rushed over, cast the second sequence of the Supreme Dao Rule Divine Power, held the Legendary Supreme Dao weapon spear, and pierced through with one blow.

Burst!!!!

The life-saving things on the other party's body had no way to resist Ye Tian's attack, and they were directly penetrated through the past.

In an instant, the body of this legendary Dao Void Demon was annihilated.

This is a demon lord, and he was killed like this.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here and continued to search for the legendary creature.

"Legendary creatures here aren't as easy to find as they are in the Legendary Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Legend has it that the ancient ruins are somewhere.

The Celestial Star Demon Lord came to a special area, he looked around cautiously, and made sure that there were no other Legends to Dao Realm nearby, so he went in directly.

After a while, he came to a special star shard.

"This is it, it hasn't changed!"

He looked at a special void node in front of him and muttered.

This Void Node is very special, the last time he entered the Legendary Ancient Realm, he found it, but he couldn't get in.

He had some guesses about this void node, which was most likely the birthplace of the Innate Primordial Treasure.

As soon as he thought of the Innate Primordial Treasure, he was extremely excited.

Even the patriarchs do not necessarily possess the innate primordial treasure.

The innate primordial treasure is enough to make him invincible in the legendary Dao realm, surpassing all the demon lords, becoming the strongest demon lord, and even expected to become a powerhouse at the level of the Demon Venerable.

He also doesn't want to be called by the Demon Venerables, and he also wants to become a Demon Venerable above the Demon Lord.

It's a pity that he knows his ability, and the possibility of becoming a Demon Venerable is too low, but the Innate Primordial Treasure allows him to transcend everything, allowing him to have this possibility.

"The role of each Innate Primordial Treasure is different, but it can increase strength, but I hope that this Innate Primordial Treasure can make my strength skyrocket in a short period of time and improve quickly!" said the Celestial Star Demon Lord secretly.

Immediately.

He took out a special spherical item, which he had traded for a lot of money from a Demon Venerable, and he could break formations, prohibitions, and void barriers, among other things.

He was going to use this Xuanyuan Realm Bead to break through this void node.

"Let's get started!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord activated the Xuanyuan Realm Bead, and then pressed it on top of the Void Node.

Bang!!!!!

The Xuanyuan Realm Bead burst out of energy, causing this piece of void to begin to collapse.

Gradually, a small void passage emerged.

"It's time to go in!"

He immediately shuttled in.

In a special void, the eyes of the Celestial Star Demon Lord were fixed on a strange statue in front of him.

"Sure enough, it's an innate primordial treasure!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord was excited.

He directly put away this innate primordial treasure, and then waited until he went back and studied it slowly.

Any innate primordial treasure is not so simple to study.

So, this kind of thing can't be rushed.

Wow!

He shuttled out quickly, and then he was ready to go out.

The blood of mere legends, even if it is the blood of the strongest legends, is far inferior to this innate original treasure!

Therefore, he didn't care about the blood of legends at all.

The Celestial Star Demon Lord is about to rush out quickly.

But just as he was about to leave, a figure appeared in his perception and killed at an extremely fast speed.

"Damn, why are you so unlucky, you are about to go out, and you have encountered the legend of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to the Dao Realm!"

He was not prepared to ignore the other party and fled directly.

But the other party's speed was too fast, and it was difficult for him to escape.

In an instant, the distance between the two sides narrowed.

And the Celestial Star Demon Lord also recognized the other party.

"Ye Tian!"

He had assassinated Ye Tian before, so he naturally recognized Ye Tian.

It's just that the assassination was bumped into by Soho, and it almost killed Soho in seconds.

"Ye Tian, get out!"

Soho didn't want to fight Ye Tian, so he snorted coldly.

"It turned out to be the Heavenly Star Demon Lord!" Ye Tian was naturally impressed by this Heavenly Star Demon Lord who had invaded the Winter Night Fortress and wanted to kill him.

Therefore, after he sensed the Celestial Star Demon Lord, he came to kill him without saying a word.

"Die!"

Ye Tian urged the dragon scale legend body with all his might.

The dragon scale legend of the Dacheng realm plus the second sequence of supreme rules made Ye Tian's breath extremely terrifying,

The Celestial Star Demon Lord was frightened.

"The second sequence of Dao rules, it's not a preliminary comprehension, when has this guy's strength reached this level!"

The Heavenly Star Demon Lord urged the life-saving thing to escape, but after Ye Tian cast the second sequence of the Dao Rules, the speed was too fast.

Rumble!!!

The second sequence of Dao rules seals the void and kills the Celestial Star Demon Lord.

See here.

The Celestial Star Demon Lord could only resist desperately, and even asked for help.

But if there is a demon lord to rescue him, then I don't know.

Burst!

Legend has it that the Supreme Dao Spear attacked instantly, and the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules turned into a point, and a terrifying attack erupted.

Just one hit.

Click!

The Celestial Star Demon Lord's body defenses were pierced, and his body was also pierced.

The power of this blow was no less than the original blow from Soho, and it directly hit the Celestial Star Demon Lord.

Except for the most demonic demon lords in the Demon Gu lineage, the other demon lords were not Ye Tian's opponents.
